entities.name: exsufflatio
entities.description: The act of blowing away the devil during Roman Catholic baptism.

entities.name: Virtutes
entities.description: The order of angels so called.

entities.name: Wier
entities.description: Cited author regarding the description of 'Leone obscurior & turpis'.

entities.name: Th. Ady
entities.description: Author of A Candle in the Dark (1656).

entities.name: abrenunciation
entities.description: The renouncing of the devil and his works in Roman Catholic baptism.

summary: This passage is a glossary from an edition of Reginald Scot's 'Discoverie of Witchcraft', providing definitions for archaic English terms and Latinate phrases used in the text. It includes linguistic notes on words related to ritual, such as exsufflatio, and references other historical authors like Wier and Th. Ady.
